key_points: She was neglected because of her appearance and stammer
Education plays a major role in her transformation
The teacher shows kindness and encouragement
The story highlights social evils like dowry and gender discrimination
Bholi gains confidence and self-respect by the end
characters: The Teacher – symbol of kindness and reform
important_events: Bholi’s bold refusal at the wedding
message: Self-respect is more important than social pressure
Girls should be educated and respected

Link Bholi’s refusal to women empowerment
